title: Gamification Engine
description: A modular framework for applying game mechanics to non-game contexts. Features user progression, badges, and dynamic leaderboards.

title: Rogue-like Prototype
description: Exploring procedural generation and tight combat loops in Unity. Built as an exercise in balancing enemy encounters.

title: Educational App Journey
description: Redesigned the onboarding and daily active user flow for a language learning app using behavioral psychology.

title: Economy Simulator
description: A web-based simulator visualizing virtual economies, resource sinks, and inflation control in MMO environments.
